title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers outlines five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations in agent systems: semantic tool selection to minimize context window bloat, graph RAG for precise queries, multi-agent validation to catch failures, symbolic guardrails enforced in code, and runtime steering for self-correction. Demos use a travel agent built with Strands Agents and show integration with Amazon Bedrock at scale.
